# Sale Invoice Blocking

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:0623e7de9a9cfd375a9247e01b706467656dd27da3caeb5f36e3cbd8816acb35
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module extends the functionality of sales to allow you to block the
creation of invoices from a sales order and give a reason.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Configuration

To configure this module, you need to:

1. Go to 'Sales > Configuration > Sales > Invoicing block reasons'.
2. Create the different reasons that can lead to block the invoices of a
   sales order.

## Usage

To use this module, you need to:

1. Create a new sale order and provide a 'Blocking for invoicing'.
2. Button "Create Invoice" is invisible if an invoicing blocking reason is set on the sale order

In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed
